title: Using unencrypted SNS topics is security-sensitive
description: Using unencrypted SNS topics is security-sensitiveAnalyze your coderesponsibility-trustworthysecuritySecurity HotspotawscweAmazon Simple Notification Service (SNS) is a managed messaging service for application-to-application (A2A) and application-to-person (A2P) communication. SNS topics allows publisher systems to fanout messages to a large number of subscriber systems. Amazon SNS allows to encrypt messages when they are received.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

compliant:
import { Topic } from 'aws-cdk-lib/aws-sns';

new Topic(this, 'exampleTopic'); // Sensitive

checks.message: SNS Topic created without encryption. Add masterKey property with a KMS key.
SNS Topic created with properties but no encryption. Add masterKey property with a KMS key.
SNS Topic created with properties but no encryption. Add masterKey property with a KMS key.
FIFO SNS Topic created without encryption. Add masterKey property with a KMS key.
SNS Topic created with deduplication but no encryption. Add masterKey property with a KMS key.
CfnTopic created without kmsMasterKeyId. Specify a KMS key ARN for encryption.
CfnTopic created without kmsMasterKeyId. Specify a KMS key ARN for encryption.
